summary: Iteration 14 testing complete. All new Job Openings and Interviews calendar features verified working. Job Openings shows roles grouped by division with 2-column layout, vendor nomination progress bars on cards with nominations, and modal with Vendor Contributions section. Interviews calendar is full-width with blue 'profiles' pills and amber 'int.' pills, date click opens detailed popup with Interviews and Profiles Submitted sections including feedback/remarks.

Job Openings header shows '42 roles · 42 open positions · 122 nominations' - PASS
Job Openings roles grouped by division (AI Research, Compliance, Data Operations, Legal, Product & Engineering, etc.) - PASS

Job Openings modal shows Vendor Contributions section with gradient progress bars and percentages - PASS

Interviews popup shows INTERVIEWS section with amber dot and count - PASS

Interviews popup shows '(no slot data)' tag for candidates without interview slot - PASS

Interviews popup shows L1 Status (Rejected in red, Shortlisted in green) - PASS
Interviews popup shows L2 Status when available - PASS

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 14 features verified. Job Openings page has enhanced cards with vendor nomination progress bars (visible on cards like DevOps Engineer, Python Fullstack, Sr. Python Full Stack, Fullstack Developer, Odoo Developer). Modal shows Vendor Contributions with gradient progress bars and percentages. Interviews calendar is full-width with submission (blue) and interview (amber) pills. Date click opens detailed popup with Interviews and Profiles Submitted sections. Candidates with interview_status but no slot show '(no slot data)' tag. Remark section shows detailed feedback. 129 submissions, 12 interviews tracked. All existing functionality (Dashboard, Candidates, Contacts) unchanged.
